assertions.title: git diff happy path — Multi-file diff produces stat summary + compact hunks with >50% savings

steps.action: Run test 'typical diff compacted with >50% savings'
steps.expected: Test passes: filtered output contains stat summary, hunk headers, and filteredChars < rawChars * 0.5
steps.observed: Test passed — multi-file diff compacted with stat summary, hunk headers for each file, and >50% token savings verified

assertions.title: git diff empty — Empty diff handled gracefully

steps.expected: Test passes: empty string input returns defined string output without throwing
steps.observed: Test passed — empty diff returns a defined string

steps.action: Run test 'empty diff with just whitespace'
steps.expected: Test passes: whitespace-only input handled gracefully

assertions.title: git diff hunk truncation — Hunks >20 lines truncated with count indicator

steps.expected: Test passes: 30-line hunk shows first 10 lines, omits line 20+, shows '... N more lines' indicator
steps.observed: Test passed — large hunk truncated with indicator, lines 20+ omitted

steps.action: Run test 'hunks with exactly 20 lines not truncated'
steps.expected: Test passes: 20-line hunk fully preserved without truncation
steps.observed: Test passed — boundary case at exactly 20 lines not truncated

steps.action: Run test 'hunks with 19 lines not truncated'

testNames: hunks with exactly 20 lines not truncated

assertions.title: git diff binary skip — Binary diffs replaced with single-line indicator

steps.expected: Test passes: binary file diff shows binary indicator with filename, text diffs still present
steps.observed: Test passed — binary file indicated, text diff preserved alongside

steps.action: Run test 'all-binary diff produces indicator only'
steps.expected: Test passes: all-binary diff shows binary indicators for each file
steps.observed: Test passed — both binary files indicated

assertions.title: git diff hunk headers — Hunk headers preserved with file:line info

steps.expected: Test passes: hunk header matches @@ src/handler.ts:NN @@ pattern
steps.observed: Test passed — hunk header contains file:line format

steps.action: Run test 'multiple hunk headers in same file preserve file:line'
steps.expected: Test passes: both hunks show @@ src/app.ts:10 @@ and @@ src/app.ts:50 @@
steps.observed: Test passed — both hunk headers contain correct file:line

testNames: multiple hunk headers in same file preserve file:line

assertions.title: git diff stat summary — Output includes files changed/insertions/deletions summary

steps.expected: Test passes: filtered output matches /\d+ files? changed/ and /insertion|deletion/
steps.observed: Test passed — stat summary with files changed and insertions/deletions present

steps.action: Run test 'single file diff has correct stat'
steps.expected: Test passes: single file diff shows '1 file changed' and '1 insertion'
steps.observed: Test passed — single file stat correct

testNames: single file diff has correct stat

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-GIT-008 through VAL-GIT-013): all 6 passed. 19 total tests in git-diff.test.ts all pass, covering happy path, empty diff, hunk truncation, binary skip, hunk headers, and stat summary.
